1._: Aderyn comes in last out of the dusk, hood back and the cold still on her, and stands near the door rather than the fire — a half-step from the way out. She takes the hall in at a glance: who is armed, who is afraid, and which of them has been up the high paths lately and come back changed. The warmth and the close walls she bears the way she bears bad weather — briefly.

content._: aderyn's account at Thousand Valleys, beat by beat.
